exercises.title: Am / Is / Are भरें
exercises.instructions: सही form of 'be' verb (am/is/are) से blank भरें।
exercises.explanation: I के साथ 'am', He/She/It और singular noun के साथ 'is', You/We/They और plural noun के साथ 'are' आता है।

exercises.title: Do / Does से questions बनाएँ
exercises.instructions: Do या Does से blank भरें।
content: ___ you and your friend study together?
exercises.explanation: He/She/It और singular noun के साथ 'Does' आता है। I/You/We/They और plural noun के साथ 'Do' आता है।

exercises.title: Don't / Doesn't से negatives बनाएँ
exercises.instructions: Don't या Doesn't से blank भरें।
exercises.explanation: He/She/It और singular noun के साथ 'doesn't' आता है। I/You/We/They और plural noun के साथ 'don't' आता है।

exercises.title: A / An / The सही article भरें
exercises.instructions: सही article (a, an, the) भरें। अगर article ज़रूरी नहीं है तो 'X' लिखें।
content: I saw ___ movie last night. ___ movie was great.
This is ___ best day of my life.
exercises.explanation: Vowel sound से शुरू होने वाले शब्दों से पहले 'an' लगता है। Specific या पहले से known चीज़ के लिए 'the' लगता है। खेलों के नाम से पहले article नहीं लगता।

exercises.title: Possessive Adjectives भरें
exercises.instructions: सही possessive adjective (my/your/his/her/its/our/their) भरें।
content: Priya and ___ sister are best friends.
exercises.explanation: Possessive adjectives noun से पहले आते हैं और ownership दर्शाते हैं। Subject के gender और number के according इन्हें choose करते हैं।

exercises.title: गलत sentences ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: नीचे दिए गए sentences में grammar की गलतियाँ हैं। सही करके लिखें।
content: She go to school every day.
Does she goes to the gym?
answer: She goes to school every day.
Does she go to the gym?
exercises.explanation: He/She/It के साथ verb में 's/es' लगता है, doesn't/does के बाद base verb आती है, am/is/are के बाद infinitive नहीं आता, frequency adverbs आमतौर पर main verb से पहले लेकिन be verb के बाद आते हैं।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Daily Routine
exercises.instructions: इन Hindi sentences को English में translate करें।
content: वह school bus से जाती है।
हम साथ में खाना खाते हैं।
वे रात को जल्दी सो जाते हैं।
मेरी बहन रोज़ exercise करती है।
हमारे शहर में बहुत traffic है।
मैं अपना homework खुद करता हूँ।
answer: They go to sleep early at night.
There is a lot of traffic in our city.
exercises.explanation: Simple Present tense में I/We/You/They के साथ base verb, He/She/It के साथ verb+s/es आता है। Questions में Do/Does subject से पहले, negatives में don't/doesn't आता है।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Family
exercises.instructions: इन family-related sentences को English में translate करें।
content: मेरी बहन की शादी हो गई है।
क्या तुम्हारे माता-पिता यहाँ रहते हैं?
मेरी नानी दिल्ली में रहती हैं।
हम सब एक साथ रहते हैं।
मेरे चाचाजी की अपनी दुकान है।
answer: My maternal grandmother lives in Delhi.
My uncle has his own shop.
exercises.explanation: Family members describe करते समय possessive adjectives (my/his/her/our/their) का सही use करना ज़रूरी है। Singular family member के साथ 'is', plural के साथ 'are' आता है।

exercises.title: अपने बारे में एक paragraph लिखें
exercises.instructions: नीचे दिए गए points का उपयोग करके खुद के बारे में एक 6-8 sentences का paragraph लिखें: name, age, city, family, job/studies, hobby, one daily habit.
exercises.content: Write a paragraph about yourself using: your name, where you are from, what you do (job/study), your family, your hobby, and one thing you do every day.
exercises.answer: My name is Rahul Sharma. I am 22 years old. I am from Jaipur, Rajasthan. I am a student at Delhi University. I study computer science. My family has four members — my parents, my younger sister, and me. My father works in a bank and my mother is a homemaker. My hobby is reading books and playing cricket. I read for at least 30 minutes every night before sleeping.
exercises.explanation: Paragraph में SVO structure follow करें। Simple Present tense का use करें। Possessive adjectives और articles का सही use करें। हर sentence complete और meaningful होनी चाहिए।

exercises.title: अपने घर के बारे में लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपने घर का वर्णन करते हुए 5-6 sentences लिखें। Location, rooms, what you like about it, और daily activities at home शामिल करें।
exercises.content: Describe your home — where it is, how many rooms, what you like about it, and what you do at home.
exercises.answer: I live in a two-bedroom flat in Pune. It is on the third floor of an apartment building. Our home has a small but beautiful garden on the balcony. My mother always keeps the house clean and tidy. In the evening, our family sits together in the living room. I usually study in my room after dinner. I love my home because it is peaceful and comfortable.
exercises.explanation: Home describe करते समय location prepositions (in, on, at) का सही use करें। Size और quality के लिए adjectives use करें। Daily routine के लिए frequency adverbs use करें।

exercises.title: दोस्त को Email लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपने एक दोस्त को English में email लिखें जिसमें आप उसे अपने नए school/job के बारे में बताएँ। 80-100 words।
exercises.content: Write an email to your friend Priya telling her about your new school or job. Include: what you do there, when you go, what you like, and ask about her life.
exercises.answer:
Subject: My New School!

Dear Priya,

Hope you are doing well! I want to tell you about my new school. I study at Green Valley School now. I go to school at 8 AM every day. My teachers are very helpful and kind. I like my English class the most. My new friends are very friendly. I don't feel homesick anymore.

How is your life? Do you still go to the same school? Write back soon!

Your friend,
Anita
exercises.explanation: Email में greeting (Dear...), body (main content), और closing (Your friend, ...) होते हैं। Simple Present tense का use करें। Questions पूछने के लिए Do/Does use करें।

exercises.title: Frequency Adverbs सही जगह लगाएँ
exercises.instructions: brackets में दिया गया frequency adverb सही position पर लगाएँ।
content: I drink coffee in the morning. (always)
I feel tired in the evening. (often)
My boss is happy with my work. (usually)
answer: She is never late for work.
I always drink coffee in the morning.
They usually go out on weekends.
She is never rude to anyone.
I often feel tired in the evening.
My boss is usually happy with my work.
exercises.explanation: Frequency adverbs (always, usually, often, sometimes, rarely, never) main verb से पहले लेकिन 'be' verb (am/is/are) के बाद आते हैं।

exercises.title: Article की गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में article (a/an/the) की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: I want to be an software engineer.
The cricket is my favorite sport.
I ate a apple this morning.
Close a door when you leave.
He wants to join a army.
I read a book. Book was very good.
answer: I want to be a software engineer.
I ate an apple this morning.
Close the door when you leave.
The sun rises in the east.
He wants to join the army.
I read a book. The book was very good.
exercises.explanation: Vowel sound (a, e, i, o, u sound) से पहले 'an' आता है। Sports के नाम से पहले article नहीं आता। Unique चीज़ों (sun, moon, army) से पहले 'the' आता है। जब पहली बार mention हो तो 'a/an', दोबारा mention पर 'the' आता है।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Office / Work
exercises.instructions: इन work-related sentences को English में translate करें।
content: मैं एक IT company में काम करता हूँ।
वह हमेशा समय पर काम submit करती है।
हम हर Monday को team meeting करते हैं।
क्या आपके पास business card है?
वह freelancer के रूप में काम करता है।
answer: I work at an IT company.
He/She has a meeting at 9 AM.
She always submits work on time.
We have a team meeting every Monday.
He/She doesn't know how to speak English.
Do you have a business card?
exercises.explanation: Professional context में 'at' + company name, 'in' + location, 'as' + job role का use होता है। 'Is' से yes/no questions, 'Do/Does' से action questions बनते हैं।

exercises.title: Object Pronouns भरें
exercises.instructions: सही object pronoun (me/you/him/her/it/us/them) से blank भरें।
exercises.explanation: Object pronouns subject pronouns की जगह verb के बाद आते हैं। I→me, He→him, She→her, We→us, They→them, It→it, You→you।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — WH Questions
exercises.instructions: इन Hindi questions को English में translate करें।
content: यह movie कब शुरू होती है?
answer: How do you go to school?
exercises.explanation: WH questions बनाने के लिए: WH word + do/does + subject + base verb? या WH word + is/are + subject? structure follow होता है।

exercises.title: अपने favorite food के बारे में लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपने पसंदीदा food के बारे में 5-6 sentences लिखें। What it is, why you like it, when/where you eat it, who makes it शामिल करें।
exercises.content: Write about your favorite food — what it is, why you love it, when you eat it, who makes it best.
exercises.answer: My favorite food is Dal Makhani. It is a famous North Indian dish. My mother makes it every Sunday. She cooks it slowly in a big pot. The rich, creamy taste is amazing. I never miss a chance to eat it. I sometimes also eat it at restaurants, but my mother's Dal Makhani is the best. It makes me feel at home.
exercises.explanation: Food describe करते समय adjectives (rich, creamy, spicy, famous) use करें। Frequency adverbs से बताएँ कितनी बार खाते हैं। 'The best' superlative form है।

exercises.title: Verb Form की गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में verb की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: She go to market every evening.
They goes to school by bus.
Does she works in a hospital?
She is go to the office.
answer: She goes to market every evening.
They go to school by bus.
Does she work in a hospital?
She is going to the office.
exercises.explanation: He/She/It के साथ verb+s/es, They/We/I के साथ base verb। doesn't/don't के बाद base verb आती है। Does + subject + base verb? Frequency adverb (always) main verb से पहले आता है। 'Good' adjective है, 'well' adverb।

exercises.title: Prepositions — In / On / At भरें
exercises.instructions: सही preposition (in/on/at) से blank भरें।
exercises.explanation: AT: specific time (at 6 AM), specific place (at the airport, at work). IN: cities/countries, months, years, morning/evening/afternoon. ON: days of week, dates, surfaces।

exercises.title: Job Application Letter
exercises.instructions: एक simple job application letter लिखें। 80-100 words। Position: English Teacher at a school.
exercises.content: Write a simple job application for the position of English Teacher. Include: your name, your qualification, your experience, why you want the job, and contact information.
exercises.answer:
Subject: Application for English Teacher Position

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to apply for the position of English Teacher at your school. My name is Meera Singh. I have a B.Ed. degree in English. I have two years of teaching experience. I am patient, dedicated, and hardworking. I speak English fluently. I love working with children and helping them learn. I always prepare my lessons well. Please find my resume attached.

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,
Meera Singh
Phone: 98XXXXXXXX
exercises.explanation: Formal letter में: Subject line, Dear Sir/Madam greeting, body में qualifications, experience, और skills, और formal closing (Sincerely/Yours faithfully) होता है।

exercises.title: Third Person Singular — Verb+S/ES
exercises.instructions: Subject के according सही verb form से blank भरें।
content: My dog ___ every time I come home. (bark)
He ___ to the temple every morning. (go)
exercises.explanation: He/She/It और singular noun के साथ verb में: सामान्यतः 's' लगता है (work→works), s/sh/ch/x/o से ending verbs में 'es' (go→goes), consonant+y से ending verbs में y को i करके 'es' (reply→replies)।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Emotions and Feelings
exercises.instructions: इन Hindi sentences को English में translate करें।
content: मैं नई job से excited हूँ।
वह अपने results से disappointed है।
वह किसी बात से upset है।
answer: I am excited about the new job.
He/She is disappointed with the results.
exercises.explanation: Feelings describe करने के लिए 'am/is/are + adjective' structure use करें। Prepositions: excited about, disappointed with, upset about, proud of।

exercises.title: अपने शहर के बारे में लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपने शहर के बारे में 6-8 sentences लिखें। Name, location, size, famous places, weather, what you like/dislike about it शामिल करें।
exercises.content: Write about your city — its name, location, famous things, weather, and what you feel about it.
exercises.answer: I live in Lucknow, the capital of Uttar Pradesh. It is a beautiful and historic city. The city is famous for its Nawabi culture, kebabs, and chikankari embroidery. The weather here is very hot in summer but pleasant in winter. I love the Bhool Bhulaiyaa and Bara Imambara. The food in Lucknow is amazing — especially the biryani and sheermal. The people here are very polite and warm. I always feel proud to be from Lucknow.
exercises.explanation: City describe करते समय: is famous for, the weather is, I love, I feel proud — ये useful expressions हैं। Simple Present tense में describe करें।

exercises.title: Complete Mixed Grammar Correction
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में कोई भी grammar mistake हो सकती है। ढूंढकर ठीक करें।
content: He always comes to office in time.
She is knowing English very well.
They are usually go by metro.
He is more taller than me.
We are live in the same city.
answer: He always comes to office on time.
She doesn't go to the gym.
We live in the same city.
exercises.explanation: On time (सही समय पर) vs. in time। Have/know stative verbs हैं - इनका continuous form नहीं बनता। After does, base verb आती है। Double negative (don't + no) गलत होता है। More + taller double comparative है। Am/is/are के बाद base verb नहीं आती।

exercises.title: अपनी daily routine लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपनी एक पूरे दिन की routine 8-10 sentences में लिखें। Morning से रात तक। Time expressions और frequency adverbs use करें।
exercises.content: Write your complete daily routine from morning to night using time expressions (at 6 AM, in the afternoon, at night) and frequency adverbs (always, usually, sometimes, never).
exercises.answer: I always wake up at 6 AM. First, I brush my teeth and take a bath. Then I eat breakfast with my family. I usually have bread, butter, and tea. I go to college at 8:30 AM by metro. I study there until 2 PM. In the afternoon, I eat lunch and rest for 30 minutes. After that, I do my homework and study for the next day. I sometimes play cricket with my friends in the evening. At night, my family eats dinner together at 9 PM. I usually read for 30 minutes before sleeping. I never sleep after midnight.
exercises.explanation: Daily routine describe करने के लिए: time expressions (at 6 AM, in the afternoon), sequence words (first, then, after that), और frequency adverbs (always, usually, sometimes, never) का use करें।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Object Pronouns
exercises.instructions: इन Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। Object pronoun पर ध्यान दें।
content: हमारे teacher हमें हमेशा encourage करते हैं।
मेरी माँ मुझसे बहुत प्यार करती है।
उन्होंने हमें airport पर drop किया।
वह इसे ठीक नहीं कर सकता।
answer: My mother loves me a lot.
They dropped us at the airport.
exercises.explanation: Object pronouns (me, him, her, us, them, it) verb के बाद आते हैं। Subject pronoun (I, He, She, They) को object position में कभी use नहीं करते।

exercises.title: Object Pronoun की गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में object pronoun की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: She gave the book to I.
I saw they at the market.
My boss called I for a meeting.
Between you and I, this is wrong.
She told the news to he.
The teacher praised we for our work.
answer: She gave the book to me.
I saw them at the market.
My boss called me for a meeting.
Between you and me, this is wrong.
She told the news to him.
The teacher praised us for our work.
exercises.explanation: Preposition और verb के बाद subject pronoun नहीं, object pronoun आता है: I→me, She→her, We→us, They→them, He→him।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Possessive Adjectives
exercises.instructions: इन sentences को English में translate करें। Possessive adjective सही से use करें।
content: मेरा फ़ोन नंबर बदल गया है।
हमारा घर बाज़ार के पास है।
मेरी माँ की तबीयत ठीक नहीं है।
answer: Our house is near the market.
His father is in the army.
exercises.explanation: Possessive adjectives: my (मेरा/मेरी), your (तुम्हारा/तुम्हारी), his (उसका — male), her (उसकी — female), its (इसका — thing), our (हमारा/हमारी), their (उनका/उनकी)।

exercises.title: Possessive Adjectives vs Object Pronouns
exercises.instructions: Bracket में दिए गए hint को देखकर सही possessive adjective या object pronoun भरें।
exercises.explanation: Noun से पहले possessive adjective (my, his, her, our, their) आता है। Verb या preposition के बाद object pronoun (me, him, her, us, them) आता है।

exercises.title: Negative Sentences — Don't / Doesn't गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में don't/doesn't की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: He don't go to the gym.
He doesn't going to work today.
answer: He doesn't go to the gym.
He doesn't go to work today.
exercises.explanation: He/She/It और singular noun के साथ 'doesn't' आता है। I/You/We/They के साथ 'don't' आता है। Don't/doesn't के बाद हमेशा base verb आती है, verb+s या verb+ing नहीं।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Negative Sentences
exercises.instructions: इन Hindi negative sentences को English में translate करें।
content: वह office देर से नहीं आती।
हम Sunday को काम नहीं करते।
वह किसी की बात नहीं सुनता।
वे इस city में नहीं रहते।
हम बाहर का खाना कम खाते हैं।
answer: She doesn't come late to the office.
They don't live in this city.
exercises.explanation: Negative sentences: I/We/You/They + don't + base verb। He/She/It + doesn't + base verb। Doesn't/don't के बाद verb में 's/es' नहीं लगता।

exercises.title: Question Formation की गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन questions में grammar की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: Do she work in a hospital?
Where does she goes on weekends?
Does he going to school today?
answer: Does she work in a hospital?
Where does she go on weekends?
Does he go to school today?
What do you eat for breakfast?
exercises.explanation: He/She/It → Does + subject + base verb। They/You/We/I → Do + subject + base verb। Does/Do के बाद हमेशा base verb आती है। WH questions: WH word + do/does + subject + base verb?

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Common Verbs
exercises.instructions: इन sentences को English में translate करें। Common verbs का सही use करें।
content: मैं हर रात 7 बजे खाना खाता हूँ।
वह अपने दोस्तों को रोज़ call करती है।
हम हर Sunday को मंदिर जाते हैं।
वह बहुत अच्छी guitar बजाती है।
मेरे पिताजी newspaper ज़रूर पढ़ते हैं।
वह हर रात diary लिखती है।
मैं हर morning 2 km walk करता हूँ।
वे हर साल नई car खरीदते हैं।
हम एक दूसरे की मदद करते हैं।
answer: He goes to the gym every day.
I eat dinner at 7 PM every night.
She calls her friends every day.
We go to the temple every Sunday.
She plays the guitar very well.
My father always reads the newspaper.
She writes in her diary every night.
They buy a new car every year.
exercises.explanation: Common verbs (go, eat, call, play, read, write, walk, buy, help) He/She/It के साथ verb+s/es form लेते हैं। Regular daily actions के लिए simple present tense use करें।

exercises.title: Daily Vocabulary — Fill the Verb
exercises.instructions: Bracket में दिए गए verb की सही form से blank भरें।
content: They ___ their vegetables from the market. (buy)
exercises.explanation: He/She/It: go→goes, wash→washes, make→makes, bark→barks, cut→cuts, pay→pays, keep→keeps, deliver→delivers। I/They: buy, wash (no change needed)।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Articles A/An/The
exercises.instructions: इन sentences को English में translate करें। Articles का सही use करें।
content: वह एक university में पढ़ाता है।
क्या तुम्हारे पास one-rupee coin है?
Taj Mahal एक बहुत सुंदर इमारत है।
answer: I will watch a movie tomorrow.
Do you have a one-rupee coin?
The Taj Mahal is a very beautiful building.
The sun sets in the west.
exercises.explanation: Vowel sound से शुरू होने वाले शब्दों से पहले 'an' (an honest, an umbrella, an orange)। 'A' से पहले consonant sound (a university — 'yoo' sound)। Specific/known चीज़ से पहले 'the'।

exercises.title: Possessive Adjectives vs Possessive Pronouns — गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में possessive adjective की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: Her sister and her brother are doctors.
My and your books are on the table.
She lost his bag yesterday. (subject: she)
His children play with their toys (referring to her children).
The company and it's employees are happy.
We enjoy our ours holidays together.
I forgot my mine wallet at home.
Their house and their car are new.
She is proud of her her achievement.
He takes good care of his his health.
answer: Her sister and her brother are doctors.
My books and your books are on the table.
Her children play with their toys.
The company and its employees are happy.
I forgot my wallet at home.
Their house and their car are new.
She is proud of her achievement.
He takes good care of his health.
exercises.explanation: Possessive adjective (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) noun से पहले एक बार आता है। 'Its' = possessive (no apostrophe); 'it's' = it is। Subject के gender से match करना ज़रूरी है।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — SVO Structure
exercises.instructions: इन sentences को English में SVO (Subject-Verb-Object) structure में translate करें।
content: वह हर रात किताब पढ़ती है।
हमारा driver गाड़ी बहुत अच्छे से चलाता है।
मैं हर सुबह अखबार पढ़ता हूँ।
वे हर साल new year celebrate करते हैं।
वह अपने माता-पिता की देखभाल करती है।
हम एक साथ lunch खाते हैं।
answer: She reads a book every night.
Our driver drives the car very well.
I read the newspaper every morning.
They celebrate New Year every year.
She takes care of her parents.
exercises.explanation: English में SVO order follow होता है: Subject पहले, फिर Verb, फिर Object। Hindi में SOV order होता है (Subject-Object-Verb) इसलिए English में translate करते समय verb को object से पहले लाना होता है।

exercises.title: रिश्तेदार को Email — घर की खबर
exercises.instructions: अपने दूर रहने वाले चाचाजी को English में email लिखें जिसमें घर की खबर हो। 80-100 words।
exercises.content: Write an email to your uncle who lives in another city. Tell him about your family's health, your studies or work, and invite him to visit you.
exercises.answer:
Subject: Greetings from Home!

Dear Uncle,

Hope you and Aunty are doing well. We are all fine here. My father goes to work every day and my mother is keeping good health. I am studying hard for my exams. My sister is working in a new company now and she loves her job. Our house is the same, but we miss you a lot. Do you plan to visit us this month? We all want to meet you. Please write back soon.

With love,
Rohan
exercises.explanation: Personal email में friendly tone रखें। Simple Present tense का use करें। 'Do you plan to...' question structure का use करें। Closing में 'With love' या 'Warm regards' लिख सकते हैं।

exercises.title: अपने best friend के बारे में लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपने best friend के बारे में 6-8 sentences लिखें। Name, appearance, nature, what you like about him/her, what you do together शामिल करें।
exercises.content: Write about your best friend — who they are, what they look like, their nature, why you like them, and what you do together.
exercises.answer: My best friend's name is Amit. He is tall and has short black hair. He is very funny and always makes me laugh. He studies in the same college as me. We sit together in every class. He never gives up on his work and that inspires me. He always helps me when I don't understand something. We play cricket on weekends and sometimes we go for long walks in the evening. I am very lucky to have him as my friend.
exercises.explanation: Describe करते समय: physical description (tall, short hair), personality (funny, helpful), shared activities (play, walk)। Possessive adjective 'his/her' सही से use करें। Simple Present tense में write करें।

exercises.title: WH Question Words भरें
exercises.instructions: सही WH question word (What/Where/When/Who/Why/How) से blank भरें।
content: ___ does she go to the market?
___ do you come to office — by bus or by metro?
exercises.explanation: What = क्या (thing/information), Where = कहाँ (place), When = कब (time), Who = कौन (person), Why = क्यों (reason), How = कैसे (manner), How many = कितने (quantity)।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Daily Vocabulary (Market/Shopping)
exercises.instructions: इन shopping और market से जुड़े sentences को English में translate करें।
content: क्या इस पर कोई offer है?
वह रोज़ सब्ज़ी मंडी जाती है।
क्या आप change दे सकते हैं?
मैं online shopping करना पसंद करता हूँ।
वे हर महीने grocery खरीदते हैं।
answer: Is there any offer on this?
She goes to the vegetable market every day.
exercises.explanation: Shopping vocabulary: expensive, offer, size, opens, total amount, change, groceries। Is/Are से yes/no questions। Can + base verb से requests/questions। Simple Present tense for regular actions।

exercises.title: SVO Order की गलतियाँ ठीक करें
exercises.instructions: इन sentences में word order की गलतियाँ ठीक करें।
content: Every day I to school go.
He the newspaper reads morning every.
Milk drinks my brother every night.
answer: I go to school every day.
He reads the newspaper every morning.
My brother drinks milk every night.
exercises.explanation: English SVO order: Subject + Verb + Object। Frequency adverbs main verb से पहले लेकिन be verb के बाद। Adjectives noun से पहले। Adverbs verb के बाद आमतौर पर। Subject हमेशा sentence की शुरुआत में।

exercises.title: Hindi से English — Health and Body Vocabulary
exercises.instructions: इन health-related sentences को English में translate करें।
content: डॉक्टर ने उसे आराम करने को कहा।
वह हर महीने doctor को दिखाता है।
उसे अपनी दवाई समय पर लेनी चाहिए।
पानी पीना सेहत के लिए अच्छा है।
answer: The doctor told him to rest.
He visits the doctor every month.
I have a cough and cold.
She should take her medicine on time.
Drinking water is good for health.
exercises.explanation: Health expressions: have a fever, have a stomach ache, have a cough। Doctor told him to = doctor ने उसे कहा। Should + base verb = चाहिए। Good for = के लिए अच्छा।

exercises.title: Mixed: Subject Pronouns vs Object Pronouns
exercises.instructions: Bracket में दिए गए hint के अनुसार सही pronoun (subject या object) भरें।
content: ___ are going to the market. (they — subject)
I invited ___ to the party. (they — object)
exercises.explanation: Subject pronouns (I, He, She, They, It, We) sentence में subject की position पर आते हैं। Object pronouns (me, him, her, them, it, us) verb या preposition के बाद आते हैं।

exercises.title: अपने पसंदीदा त्योहार के बारे में लिखें
exercises.instructions: अपने पसंदीदा Indian festival के बारे में 6-8 sentences लिखें। Name, when it comes, how you celebrate, what you eat, what you like about it शामिल करें।
exercises.content: Write about your favourite festival — when it is, how your family celebrates it, what you eat, and why you love it.
exercises.answer: My favourite festival is Diwali. It comes every year in October or November. We clean and decorate our house before Diwali. My mother makes many sweets at home. We wear new clothes and visit our relatives. In the evening, we light diyas and candles everywhere. The sky is full of fireworks and colours. I love Diwali because it brings our whole family together. My grandmother always tells us the story of Lord Rama. It is truly the festival of light and happiness.
exercises.explanation: Festival describe करते समय: when (October/November), how (clean, decorate, light diyas), what (sweets, new clothes), why (because it brings family together)। Simple Present tense में describe करें। Possessive adjectives और articles सही से use करें।
